case_title: S AND C MOTORS INC VS GREER, PETER C.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY S AND C MOTORS INC AS TO DEFENDANT GREER, PETER C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
